"const searchWrapper = this.closest(\"[data-search-wrapper]\");\n\nlet groupTemplate;\nlet itemTemplate;\n\nfunction renderSearchResults(data) {\n const container = document.querySelector(\".lower-part\");\n\n // Cache templates ONLY ONCE\n if (!groupTemplate) {\n groupTemplate = container.querySelector(\".group\").cloneNode(true);\n itemTemplate = container.querySelector(\".item\").cloneNode(true);\n }\n\n container.innerHTML = \"\";\n\n function createGroup(title, list, type) {\n if (!list || list.length === 0) return;\n\n // \u2705 ALWAYS CLONE\n const group = groupTemplate.cloneNode(true);\n\n group.querySelector(\".group-name p\").textContent = title;\n\n // remove template items inside group\n group.querySelectorAll(\"a.item\").forEach(el => el.remove());\n\n list.forEach((item) => {\n // \u2705 ALWAYS CLONE\n const node = itemTemplate.cloneNode(true);\n\n const img = node.querySelector(\".item-image\");\n const nameEl = node.querySelector(\".item-name p\");\n const descEl = node.querySelector(\".item-desc p\");\n const descWrapper = node.querySelector(\".item-desc\");\n\n // fallback image\n let fallbackImg = node.querySelector(\".no-image\");\n if (!fallbackImg) {\n fallbackImg = document.createElement(\"div\");\n fallbackImg.className = \"no-image\";\n fallbackImg.textContent = \"No Image Available\";\n fallbackImg.style.cssText = `\n width: 20%;\n height: 80px;\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n justify-content: center;\n background: #f0f0f0;\n font-size: 10px;\n color: #666;\n border-radius: 8px;\n `;\n img.parentNode.insertBefore(fallbackImg, img);\n }\n\n // ---- TYPE HANDLING ----\n if (type === \"items\") {\n node.href = `/item/${item.name}`;\n nameEl.textContent = item.web_item_name || \"Unnamed Item\";\n\n if (item.website_image) {\n img.src = item.website_image;\n img.style.display = \"block\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"none\";\n } else {\n img.style.display = \"none\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"flex\";\n }\n\n descEl.textContent =\n item.short_description || \"No description available\";\n descWrapper.style.display = \"-webkit-box\";\n }\n\n if (type === \"categories\") {\n node.href = `/category/${item.name}`;\n nameEl.textContent = item.name;\n\n if (item.category_image) {\n img.src = item.category_image;\n img.style.display = \"block\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"none\";\n } else {\n img.style.display = \"none\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"flex\";\n }\n\n descEl.textContent =\n item.description || \"No description available\";\n descWrapper.style.display = \"-webkit-box\";\n }\n\n if (type === \"collections\") {\n node.href = `/collection/${item.name}`;\n nameEl.textContent = item.name;\n\n if (item.collection_image) {\n img.src = item.collection_image;\n img.style.display = \"block\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"none\";\n } else {\n img.style.display = \"none\";\n fallbackImg.style.display = \"flex\";\n }\n\n descEl.textContent =\n item.description || \"No description available\";\n descWrapper.style.display = \"-webkit-box\";\n }\n\n group.appendChild(node);\n });\n\n container.appendChild(group);\n }\n\n createGroup(\"Items\", data.items, \"items\");\n createGroup(\"Categories\", data.categories, \"categories\");\n createGroup(\"Collections\", data.collections, \"collections\");\n}\n\nif (!this.dataset.blockId) {\n renderSearchResults({})\n}\n\nsearchWrapper.addEventListener(\"new-result\", (e) => {\n renderSearchResults(e.detail);\n});", "blockDataScript": "", "blockId": "pw5debj56", "blockName": "lower-part",
